writingStrategy.audienceNeed: 确认 Mermaid 能作为可见主视觉进入 PPTX。
evidenceRules: 示例只验证渲染，不表达事实结论

slides.title: 座舱价值怎么形成
slides.subtitle: 把三个输入能力汇聚成一个用户能感知的结果。
slides.coreMessage: 复杂能力需要被翻译成用户价值。
slides.pageConclusion: 座舱价值不是功能堆叠，而是降低使用成本。
slides.audienceQuestion: 这些功能到底对我有什么用？
visibleBody: 座舱价值不是功能堆叠，而是降低使用成本。
supportingDetails: 本页用于验证 diagram-first 能把 Mermaid 转成可见 PPT 原生图解。
slides.speakerNote: 先读左侧三个输入，再落到右侧结果。

layout.densityRule: one primary diagram, four concise nodes

visualStrategy.decisionReason: This page explains a logic relationship, not a realistic scene. Mermaid is better for structure than an AI-generated image.
visualStrategy.audienceValue: The audience can see how three cockpit capabilities converge into one user-side value.

aiImageUse.reason: An AI-generated cockpit scene would add atmosphere but would not clarify the convergence logic.

mermaidUse.reason: The slide needs a visible convergence diagram.
mermaidUse.expectedOutput: Three input nodes converge into one value node.

nativeComponentUse.reason: The PPTX renderer should keep the nodes and labels editable.

visualStrategy.fallback: Use PPT-native boxes and connectors if Mermaid SVG rendering is unavailable.

componentPlan.purpose: show three cockpit capability inputs converging into one user value
componentPlan.fallback: Use four editable PPT-native nodes with connector lines.

diagramPlan.purpose: show how three cockpit capabilities converge into one user value
diagramPlan.syntax:
flowchart LR
A[信息更清楚] --> D[使用成本降低]
B[操作更顺手] --> D
C[场景更连贯] --> D
diagramPlan.relationshipToSlideMessage: The diagram explains how separate cockpit capabilities become one user-side value.
diagramPlan.fallback: Use three editable input nodes converging into one value node

visual.message: Three inputs converge into one value.
